title: A11y in the Age of Vanilla Web Components
description: Explaining how to manage keyboard focus inside Shadow DOM elements, ensuring keyboard trapped navigation is avoided in native web interfaces.

title: Demystifying CSS Focus-Visible: Outlines with High Contrast
description: A deep dive into styling modern, attractive focus outlines that meet WCAG 2.1 contrast standards without relying on browser default styles.

title: Accessible SVG Animations without JS
description: Demonstrating how to create interactive and accessible SVG graphics using native markup rules and pure CSS keyframes, while respecting prefers-reduced-motion media queries.
